h1cbf1332gd34eg438egad5bg2e62ef2d6e64: What the... it's gone! The artefact - what have you done with it?
habe01870g7802g4da5gba05g5ca18b06080a: *Your mind briefly swaps with hers. You both wince in discomfort as you recognise you share the same infection.*
hd47b60b5ge40eg490bga763g2c5caf23926e: Thank you... though you shouldn't have had it to begin with.
h6b5068eagfefag4656ga089g6a73308f7ddd: We've got the same problem, after all. Let's try to find a solution together, before it's too late.
h10031d33gc10fg4526g97eag2edfa4e9c145: All right, fine. Let's stay together.
h86e704cdgdc44g41dbg9455ga746809c5c0d: Wait. Perhaps we shouldn't. You're not the one I need to talk to, are you? Not really.
h5111be65g9377g4061g8d39g19650a0fcc22: I can feel it, in your head. You follow someone else's orders. I'll deal with them, not you.
he216a0c0g5f18g4ca1g9824ga1ed875afc7a: Fine. I'll see about introducing you.
hfa64ec5fg10bdg46a3g907dgd60c9d205f6a: I can't promise I'll wait forever. Perhaps our paths will cross again later.
h263917bcgacf2g4d42g8852ga5d6bd75e0c3: Wait - after all that, you won't join me?
h6a6b5a65g52c2g4a30g9fc4gd4c9f2529cb2: I'll join - if I can speak to whoever's really in charge. Otherwise, I'd best be on my way.
h02bc30ffgaa1cg48fdgb822gdf53beb55c95: You know, I think I'd rather take my chances without you.
hdb4ba191gb6f3g4a57g8aa0g1d7609eb6e89: Perhaps we'll meet again. If you survive, that is.
he5ab4a20g0c26g465dgac61gd9396bcf0724: You seem overburdened with hangers-on already.
h6f10793ag765fg4276ga489g60e44b86fde3: I'll mark my camp on your map. You can rest there.
hb541fcbbgc3c3g4345g80aagf55dcd4077b7: Take what? You don't have it!
h05848f6bga017g4c10gb7dcg43ab7ade0a70: None of your concern - it's mine now.
h0a31d14fg7639g4583gabdeg0cc8eed08766: I can't let you do that.
h8f29514dg10f7g49begbbc3gf89b9b4788b3: Artefact? I don't have anything like that.
hc6e33be3ge774g448fg962bg4be2c6db6609: No - you're trying to trick me. You must have it. I'll take it off your corpse soon enough.
h0114d0b5gc19bg4bd9ga1begb17129a06b7b: There must be some kind of mistake.
h4f48a2a2g5b45g468bg917fg73fa15f5ee4c: Yes. But it'll soon be remedied, once I've taken what's mine from your corpse.
h81dafb7fg144bg4e94ga9bfg98b91f3a9efa: I'm alive... did you save me?
hf5a95944g5dc4g40b8gb2bagea159c4259fd: Thank you... maybe I should come with you - return the favour by watching your back.
hf0673b9bg84fbg40a2gacf2g5f97fe979391: Just try to stay alive this time.
h909a0aabg9f3eg4acfg9da8g9fca9c504472: I intend to, trust me... On that score, maybe we should stay together - better odds of survival.
h65904682g2e01g41a6gb1a5gd62beee82392: I wanted to kill you myself.
h98bd57cag38ffg4cf4ga575ga297cd84c85e: What the - you're the one who killed me! Why did you bring me back?
h0b667741g9630g4a24g9880gba653736ca98: To fix a mistake. I didn't mean to kill you.
h327e4677g8cefg4288gbde9gde30fe160322: Well make sure it's a mistake you don't repeat.
he79b978dg89f0g4cecg8632g668e44f31741: Now, instead of killing and resurrecting each other, we should just work together and try to stay alive.
h34dfd70dgc5b9g4ce3gb39ag27bd1b76899e: It was a mistake - I didn't mean to knock you out.
h4d6a1042g7eeag4b1cga20ag79840f4b5ea7: Well, make sure it's a mistake you don't repeat. I've enough problems with my memory as it is...
h23700dc1ga5dfg4425gbffag5c8536139fc8: Nothing. You and I ought to be considering how we're going to survive this mess - we should stay together.
hfa7d6056g50d5g4658g9d63g910fcd8d9d32: Seems you're the closest thing to an ally I've encountered so far - we should stay together, in the interest of survival.
haea6ad3ege8f6g4f8dgbd65g19ca6ef5d495: I decided you might prove useful.
h673baa46g68c8g43d9g81d3g4670114a8778: How gracious of you. Try it again, and I'll leave you in pieces.
h0b4410c3g8071g4b70g844dg80bdfc15fd33: That said, you're the likeliest ally I've encountered so far. Perhaps we should stay together.
h0845d235gf972g4c34gb580g29dd72a7f480: I had so much fun killing you last time, I figured I'd do it again.
hbe74efdag9451g4d76gb65fga3f1196be64b: Wait - you're the one who attacked me! What the hells are you playing at?!
